name: Sankyo Kasei Corporation
summary: Sankyo Kasei Corporation sells various chemicals in Japan. It manufactures synthetic resins, dyes, pigments, paints, dyeing auxiliary poisons, and deleterious substances; sells and imports/exports building materials, electrical equipment and parts, machines, tools, and other general goods; processes chemicals and natural fibers; researches and develops alcoholic beverages, drinking water, condiments, The company provides additives for concrete/cement mortar improvement, asphalt modification, and soil improvement; residential interior building materials, fixtures and furniture, kitchen, various doors for storage, hospital furniture, surface materials for building, adhesive, and plastic molded products. In addition, it offers information terminals, such as displays; functional coating agent; molded products, including CFRP; films for food and general packaging, and various printing process; and various surfactants for textile materials and processing, as well as private brand products comprises stucment, HS miracle putty, and miracone. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
